name: grocery
description: Shared household grocery list PWA — sibling to RecipeTracker

scripts.lint: pnpm -r --if-present run lint && npm --prefix functions run lint
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm -r --if-present run lint:fix && npm --prefix functions run lint:fix
scripts.test: pnpm -r --if-present run test && npm --prefix functions run test
scripts.deploy: pnpm --filter web build && firebase deploy --only hosting,functions,firestore
scripts.deploy:hosting: pnpm --filter web build && firebase deploy --only hosting
